response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to map scenes. 2. Identified introductory conversational scenes (00:00-02:42). 3. Identified performance scene (02:42-04:36). 4. Identified song title 'Chromatic Future' and composer 'Giga' from on-screen text. 5. Transcribed the lyrics, identifying mixed English/Indonesian, and prepared the English translation for the required field. 6. Constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a group of VTubers (Kobo Kanaeru, Moona Hoshinova, Takanashi Kiara, Pavolia Reine, Nanashi Mumei) discussing and subsequently performing the song 'Chromatic Future', which was produced by Giga. The video starts with conversational segments and ends after the performance concludes.

scenes.description: VTubers are talking and preparing for the performance. No music is playing.
Performance of 'Chromatic Future' featuring choreography and singing. Music produced by Giga.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Moona Hoshinova, Takanashi Kiara, Pavolia Reine, Nanashi Mumei
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Everything was easy
I did it all alone
So effortlessly
I spread my wings and let my magic unfold
Got all problems solved
Without any setbacks
There is nothing uncontrolled

There is no way I can begin
Dream life that I need to win
I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces
I know, I gotta soar a little higher
Hope all turns to be the things I desire

Layaknya burung merak yang bersayap
Kan ku taklukkan gelap
Dengan sihir angin kan ku ajak
Semua yang terlelap tuk bangkit
Melawan dunia

We'll never give up
As long as we got the strength in ourselves
We could rise above the pain
With hunger and love
Walking step by step
Trusting my own pace
Giving me what I deserve to have

Let's go, just believe me
It will never bring me down
Just believe me, let it go
It will never bring us down
Just believe me, let it go
If it's spicy, just sip something
Let it go

I've been living carefree
There's no bitter wars in the world that could affect me
I spread my wings and let my magic unfold
Not letting it show
Things but I'm bigger than my feelings, so that will be enough

There is no way I can begin
Dream life that I need to win
I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces
I know, I gotta soar a little higher
Hope all turns to be the things I desire
